---
title: "Mean-Field Theory and Coarse-Graining: Connecting Micro to Macro"
subtitle: "ABM-003 | Track C — Agent-Based Modeling"
description: "The mathematical bridge between individual-based models and population-level equations. Covers how to derive ODE/PDE descriptions from agent rules and when such approximations are valid."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Mean-Field Theory and Coarse-Graining: Connecting Micro to Macro

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
